text:
This is the first time I'm posting in this microblog. I'm writing the words you're reading in Vim
and, once I save the file, they will be pushed to my website, which runs on top of github pages.

I set this up because I sometimes feel like posting things that are too short for a proper blog
post, so I think this format makes sense. Let's see how it goes...
Working with github pages is so annoying.

The stuff people post on LinkedIn is so stupid. It usually takes 1min scrolling LinkedIn
until I want to comment on a post saying "you're so stupid," but it hasn't happend yet.
It would look very unprofessional and I don't want to come across a douche. Also I'm just
feeding the system if I contribute my personal outrage.

I have written a custom site generator for this blog, but this is why I don't
post about it much (even though it was pretty fun).

![A comic showing a plot of an inverse relationship between the number of posts published and the number of posts published about elaborate blog setups.](https://rakhim.org/images/honestly-undefined/blogging.jpg)

Via [Rakhim.org](https://rakhim.org/honestly-undefined/) ([CC BY-NC](https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by-nc/4.0/))
